day name: Feast of Christ the Lover of mankind
specialDismissal: Who willed to have His side pierced by a lance on the cross and to show His love for us to the end,
troparia: (Tone 6) Have mercy on us, O Lord, have mercy on us:* since we have no defense,* we sinners offer this supplication to You, our Master,* have mercy on us.
kontakia: (Tone 7) You showed Your most sweet Heart* to be a place of rest* for those who labor and are burdened, O Savior.* Receive us into Its bosom.* Make us worthy to live and die in It,* and then contemplate the divinity in perfect love.
